TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Raimonds_Vējonis, title = Raimonds_Vējonis, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Raimonds_Vējonis} }

S.FORM: ryax sa tay 15 nqu tay 6, Raimonds Vējonis, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1966) mrhuw Latvia ta' misuw hya' ga Raimonds Vējonis, aring ryax tay 8 squ byacing tay 7 sa kawas 2015 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'

ryax sa tay 15 nqu tay 6, Raimonds Vējonis, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1966) mrhuw Latvia ta' misuw hya' ga Raimonds Vējonis, aring ryax tay 8 squ byacing tay 7 sa kawas 2015 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, raimon*s~ɕ **jonis~ɕ, s~ɕquliq na s~ɕeziʔ. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw lat*ia taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa raimon*s~ɕ **jonis~ɕ, ariŋ rjax taj * s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ
